title: pygeum preslii var. latifolium
intro: Pygeum preslii var. latifolium is a variant of the pygeum plant, specifically a type of African cherry tree (Prunus africana) native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Pygeum preslii var. latifolium are attributed to its bark, which contains a unique compound called pygeum, a terpenoid mixture with potential therapeutic benefits. The health benefits of Pygeum preslii var. latifolium are associated with its ability to support prostate health, reduce inflammation, and improve urinary function, making it a popular herbal remedy for benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH). Herbal preparations of Pygeum preslii var. latifolium are available in capsule, tablet, and extract form, often standardized to contain a specific concentration of pygeum compounds.
benefits: Pygeum preslii var. latifolium has many benefits, such as reducing the symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH), alleviating urinary tract issues, and providing relief from an enlarged prostate. It also possesses anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body, reducing stress and anxiety. Additionally, this plant has been shown to have a positive impact on cardiovascular health, lowering cholesterol levels and improving blood flow, leading to a reduction in the risk of heart disease. By incorporating Pygeum preslii var. latifolium into one's health routine, individuals can experience improved overall well-being, enhanced quality of life, and a reduced risk of various health complications.
actions: Pygeum preslii var. latifolium has many therapeutic actions, such as inhibiting the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), which helps in reducing symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) and improves urinary flow and nighttime urination frequency in individuals with this condition. It also exhibits anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its potential in alleviating symptoms of chronic prostatitis, reducing inflammation and pain in the prostate, and improving overall prostate health. Additionally, pygeum preslii var. latifolium has been found to have a positive effect on androgenetic alopecia, or male pattern baldness, by blocking DHT and promoting hair growth, thereby improving the quality of life for individuals affected by this condition. By addressing these various health issues, pygeum preslii var. latifolium may help individuals to lead more comfortable and active daily lives, free from the limitations imposed by these conditions.
constituents: Pygeum preslii var. latifolium has many active constituents, such as flavonoids (kaempferol and quercetin), alkaloids (pygeumine and pygeminine), and terpenoids (ursolic acid and oleanolic acid), which contribute to its medicinal properties. These constituents have been shown to improve prostate health by inhibiting the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone associated with prostate enlargement and benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH). The anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties of pygeum's constituents, including phenolic acids and saponins, can also help to reduce symptoms of BPH, such as urinary frequency and nocturia, thereby improving the quality of life for individuals affected by the condition. Additionally, the plant's constituents may also have a protective effect on the cardiovascular system by reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, thereby reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease.
